content:
I think I've seen a similar contribution before. Are you the same author?

Goal # Finding D and N
* Consider removing the word "randomly". Based on https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/RSA_cryptosystem , [[P]] and [[Q]] are often prime numbers and [[E]] is selected based on calculations involving [[P]] and [[Q]].

* Consider replacing the word "large" with "suitable", since [[E]] doesn't necessarily need to be large (e.g. a commonly used value is 65537).

Goal # Encryption and Decryption Process
* Please specify which variable should be used for each parameter in the modPow function.

Goal # Encrypt
* Please specify that 0-based indexing is used for the alphabet.

* Please change "1-Find" to "1 - Find".

* Please change "2-Encrypt" to "2 - Encrypt".

Goal # Decrypt
* Please change "1-Decrypt" to "1 - Decrypt".

* Please change "2-Convert" to "2 - Convert".

Goal # Additional explanation
* Consider changing the text as follows:

(1)
transforms a structure (such as those defined by X.509) into binary code using the DER encoder
=>
defines the structure of the data, which is then encoded into binary using DER

(2)
6 bits. Since 2**6 = 64 bits, the
=>
6 bits (2**6 = 64 possible values). The

Input
* Line 5: Please change "positive" to "non-negative", since 0 appears in some cases.

Constraints
* Please add:
0 ≤ each integer in encrypted message (note) ≤ 10⁶
1 ≤ length of decrypted message (note)
Decrypted message (note) contains characters in the [[alphabet]] only.
Note: "Encrypted message" and "decrypted message" refer to either input or output depending on the mode in each case.

Tags
* Please use the existing tag "Cryptography" instead of creating a new one ("RSA").

Cases
* Decrypt Hello World (Test 2): Please remove the trailing newline from the input.

* Encrypt secret message (Test 6) and YEAH I'M SEARCHING A JOB ! HIRE ME ! (Test 7): I'm not sure whether self-promotion in a puzzle is a good idea. Consider revising the cases.

* If possible, without removing any existing cases, please add a new pair of cases of "Encrypt" and another new pair of cases of "Decrypt". All four cases should use different messages, but each message must be a shuffled version of the alphabet. If this isn't possible (for example due to constraints), please provide the reason.

Cover picture
* Consider uploading a cover image for the puzzle.

Thanks.
